answers: National parks protect natural landscapes and wildlife. Best for hiking, wildlife viewing, photography, and peace.
Top parks worldwide: Yellowstone (US), Banff (Canada), Sundarbans (Bangladesh), Serengeti (Tanzania), Torres del Paine (Chile).
Tips: book in advance (popular ones fill up), bring layers, respect wildlife (keep distance), and leave no trace.
Sundarbans: world's largest mangrove forest, home to Royal Bengal Tiger. UNESCO World Heritage Site. Bangladesh er gorbo.
